name: Question
about: Something isn't clear from the docs.

labels: question

## Before filing

- Have you checked [`cairn-design.md`](../../cairn-design.md)? Most
  "how does X work" and "why is X this way" questions are answered
  there.
- Have you searched existing issues (open and closed)?
- If your question is a **security concern**, do NOT file it here.
  Email the address in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead.

## Your question

As specific as you can make it. If the question is about a
particular design decision, citing the relevant § from the design
doc helps the maintainer respond with context.

## What you've tried

Steps you took or docs you read before filing. Helps avoid suggesting
things you've already ruled out.
